overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character in his red and blue suit walking through a detailed New York City street at night. The scene features autumn foliage, active traffic with yellow taxis, pedestrians, and the Empire State Building illuminated in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with bike share station

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the Empire State Building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a bike share station, then pausing to look up at the illuminated skyscraper

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera on the left side

entered.detail: row of blue rental bicycles in docking station on the sidewalk
iconic illuminated skyscraper with spire visible between buildings
tall building with reflective glass facade and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city sidewalk at night, passing a bike share station with blue bicycles. Spider-Man walks forward, passing pedestrians, then pauses to look up at the Empire State Building visible between the surrounding structures. The environment features modern glass buildings and street lamps illuminating the autumn evening.

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters the street crosswalk
yellow taxi passes in front, character waits then continues crossing
traffic light changes from green to red for vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating the crosswalk while avoiding passing taxis and other vehicles at the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection
woman in gray hat standing at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on dark asphalt
traffic signal showing green then changing to red

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sidewalk to street, entering a wide intersection crosswalk. A yellow taxi passes by as the traffic light changes from green to red. The Empire State Building appears closer in the view as the character navigates across the asphalt crosswalk with other pedestrians waiting at the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: city avenue lined with autumn trees and parked cars

events.description: finishes crossing and continues walking down the center of the avenue
street surface appears wet and reflective under streetlights

agents.ego_description: walking down the middle of the street between rows of parked cars and pedestrians on sidewalks

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including sedans and SUVs along the curb
blue newspaper box on the sidewalk
trees with yellow and orange fall foliage lining both sides of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking down the center of the avenue, the character moves between parked cars on the right and pedestrians on the sidewalks. The street is lined with autumn trees displaying fall colors. The pavement appears wet and reflective under the streetlights, and the Empire State Building remains visible in the distance between the urban canyon of buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with pizza shop and brick buildings

events.description: turns left from the street onto the sidewalk at the corner
pauses briefly to let pedestrians pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: turning the corner onto the sidewalk and walking past storefronts including a pizza shop

notable_agents.action: person raising arms to take a photo with phone

entered.detail: red illuminated pizza sign mounted on brick building facade
brown brick building with arched windows at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character turns left from the street onto a sidewalk at a corner, passing a brick building with a red illuminated pizza shop sign. The crowd density increases slightly with more pedestrians visible, including one person taking a photo. The Empire State Building remains visible in the background as the character continues along the concrete sidewalk past various storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling New York City street at night, transitioning from a quiet sidewalk into a wide urban intersection and finally toward a crowded commercial corner. It begins on a sidewalk passing a blue bike share station, where Spider-Man pauses to look up at the illuminated Empire State Building framed by modern glass structures. As he moves forward, the scene shifts from the pedestrian path into a wide asphalt crosswalk, passing a yellow taxi as the traffic lights change. The camera then follows him down the center of the avenue, where the environment becomes more atmospheric with wet, reflective pavement and autumn trees lining the urban canyon. Finally, the path turns left onto a concrete sidewalk, passing a red illuminated pizza shop sign and a denser crowd of pedestrians while the distant skyscraper remains a constant landmark in the background.
